top_articles.title: Oracle Releases Emergency Patch for Critical Identity Manager Vulnerability
top_articles.summary: CVE-2026-21992 can be used without authentication for remote code execution and it may have been exploited in the wild.

top_articles.title: Critical Quest KACE Vulnerability Potentially Exploited in Attacks
top_articles.summary: The vulnerability is tracked as CVE-2025-32975 and it may have been exploited in attacks against the education sector.

top_articles.title: New KB5085516 emergency update fixes Microsoft account sign-in
top_articles.summary: Microsoft has released an emergency update to address a major issue that breaks sign-ins with Microsoft accounts across multiple Microsoft apps, including Teams and OneDrive.

top_articles.title: Oracle pushes emergency fix for critical Identity Manager RCE flaw
top_articles.summary: Oracle has released an out-of-band security update to fix a critical unauthenticated remote code execution vulnerability in Identity Manager and Web Services Manager tracked as CVE-2026-21992.

top_articles.title: Critical Langflow Vulnerability Exploited Hours After Public Disclosure
top_articles.summary: Because attacker-supplied flow data is used in public flows, the bug leads to unauthenticated remote code execution.
